title: Technical cooperation to progress beneficial ownership transparency in Zambia | EITI
impact_evidence: Governance | Transparency & Accountability | Corporate transparency and reporting -> "Opening Extractives will provide sustained, multi-year support to Zambia to disclose the ownership of extractive companies." | "Open Ownership Executive Director, Thom Townsend said, "By participating in Opening Extractives, Zambia will be enabled to meet the EITI standard and other domestic and global standards for beneficial ownership implementation. The country will also be supported to publish high-quality, usable beneficial ownership data that meets the country's policy aims and objectives, through the technical assistance Open Ownership will provide."" || Governance | Transparency & Accountability | Anti-corruption and bribery risks -> "Access to quality beneficial ownership data strengthens accountability by improving the governance of energy and mining revenues, supporting business and curtailing corruption and illicit financial flows." | "Anonymous companies remain the major obstacle in the fight against money laundering and corruption." || Governance | Regulation, Compliance & Institutions | Legislative and regulatory framework effectiveness -> "Opening Extractives will support these agencies to improve the quality, reliability and use of beneficial ownership data, and in the case of PACRA, to strengthen implementation of Zambia's Companies Act which has provided for a cross-sector beneficial ownership register since 2018." | "Zambia has made good progress to date on beneficial ownership disclosure.
